creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
x11-toolkits/wxd depends on lang/gdc, which expired today.
Consequently, mark x11-toolkits/wxd deprecated too and let it expire on 2013-09-01.

The alternative would be to fix lang/gdc (again).

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: See http://beta.freshports.org/lang/gdc/ under "required for built"
